technology.title: Tom Steyer Wants to Save California From Billionaires. But Also Doesn’t Want Them to Leave
technology.summary: The hedge fund billionaire turned gubernatorial candidate wants to tax California’s ultrawealthy, regulate AI, and keep Silicon Valley happy at the same time. Good luck with that.

briefing.news_focus: The hedge fund billionaire turned gubernatorial candidate wants to tax California’s ultrawealthy, regulate AI, and keep Silicon Valley happy at the same time. Good luck with that.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 加州對沖基金億萬富翁湯姆·斯泰爾（Tom Steyer）宣布參選州長，提出計畫針對超富裕階層徵稅，並對人工智慧進行監管，同時希望維持矽谷的繁榮。他的立場引發了對如何平衡富人稅收與科技產業發展的質疑。
briefing.background: 加州擁有美國最大的經濟體之一，矽谷是全球科技創新的中心，吸引了大量的投資與人才。然而，隨著科技產業的蓬勃發展，貧富差距問題日益嚴重，導致社會不平等加劇。斯泰爾的提案反映出當前加州政府面臨的挑戰，即如何在促進經濟增長的同時，解決社會問題。過去幾年，加州政府已經開始對高收入者徵收更高稅率，這引發了部分富裕人士考慮遷出加州的可能性。
briefing.analysis: 斯泰爾的提案面臨著多重利益衝突。首先，對超富裕階層徵稅可能會引發富人遷移的風險，這對加州經濟造成潛在威脅。其次，對人工智慧的監管可能會影響科技公司的創新能力，這些公司在加州經濟中扮演著重要角色。斯泰爾希望在這兩者之間找到平衡，但這並不容易，尤其是在矽谷對政策變化的敏感性上。此外，斯泰爾的立場可能會引發其他政治候選人的反對，特別是那些支持減稅和放鬆監管的保守派人士。未來，斯泰爾的政策是否能夠獲得廣泛支持，將取決於他如何有效地溝通這些複雜的議題。

technology.title: Silicon Valley keeps misreading China’s role in tech
technology.summary: The heads of Tesla, Apple, and Nvidia regard Chinese companies as peers, not enemies, unlike most other Silicon Valley founders.

briefing.news_focus: The heads of Tesla, Apple, and Nvidia regard Chinese companies as peers, not enemies, unlike most other Silicon Valley founders.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 特斯拉、蘋果和Nvidia的領導者將中國公司視為同行，而非敵人，這與其他矽谷創始人的看法截然不同。這一觀點反映了他們對中國在科技領域角色的不同解讀，強調了合作與競爭共存的可能性。
briefing.background: 在全球科技競爭日益激烈的背景下，中國科技公司如華為和小米迅速崛起，對於美國科技巨頭形成了挑戰。矽谷的創始人們對中國的看法分歧，部分人認為中國公司是潛在的威脅，而另一些則認為應該以合作的方式共存。這種分歧影響了科技政策的制定及企業的市場策略，特別是在供應鏈和創新合作方面。
briefing.analysis: 特斯拉、蘋果和Nvidia的領導者將中國視為合作夥伴，這可能促進了他們在技術創新和市場拓展上的策略。然而，這一觀點與其他矽谷創始人形成鮮明對比，後者更傾向於將中國視為競爭對手，這可能導致更為保守的市場策略和政策取向。隨著美中科技競爭的加劇，這種看法的分歧可能會影響到投資決策和國際合作的未來走向。參考報導中提到的AI技術在改善城市基礎設施方面的潛力，雖然與主新聞無直接關聯，但也反映了科技在解決社會問題上的重要性，可能成為中美科技合作的切入點。

supporting_summaries: Crumbling roads and other hazards - can AI make our streets safer?

technology.title: Here’s why Elon Musk lost his suit against OpenAI
technology.summary: On Monday, the jury in Musk v. Altman dealt Elon Musk a major blow—reaching a unanimous advisory verdict that he had sued OpenAI too late and, as a result, his claims are barred by the applicable statutes of limitations. US District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers immediately accepted it. Musk announced on X that he will…

briefing.news_focus: On Monday, the jury in Musk v. Altman dealt Elon Musk a major blow—reaching a unanimous advisory verdict that he had sued OpenAI too late and, as a result, his claims are barred by the applicable statutes of limitations. US District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers immediately accepted it. Musk announced on X that he will…
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在Elon Musk對OpenAI的訴訟中，陪審團一致裁定Musk提起訴訟的時間已過，因而他的主張受到法律時效的限制。美國地區法官Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers立即接受了這一裁決。Musk在社交平台X上宣布他將進行上訴，試圖推翻這一結果。
briefing.background: Elon Musk是OpenAI的共同創始人之一，但隨著OpenAI的發展及其商業化進程，Musk與其他創始人之間的關係逐漸緊張。Musk曾對OpenAI的方向表示擔憂，並在2020年退出董事會。此次訴訟的核心在於Musk指控OpenAI的其他創始人對他不公。然而，根據加州法律，提起訴訟的時效限制使得Musk的訴訟面臨重大挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 此次陪審團的裁決對Musk而言是一大挫折，因為他未能在法律規定的時限內提起訴訟。這一結果可能會影響他未來對OpenAI的任何法律行動，並且可能削弱他在科技界的聲望。參考報導指出，Musk計劃對此裁決提出上訴，這表明他仍然希望尋求法律途徑來解決與OpenAI的爭端。然而，根據目前的法律框架，成功上訴的可能性不明，這也反映出Musk與OpenAI之間的深層次矛盾。各方對於Musk的訴訟時效問題的看法一致，認為這是他失敗的主要原因。

supporting_titles: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
Elon Musk took too long to sue OpenAI, jury unanimously agrees
supporting_summaries: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.
Musk plans to appeal after judge immediately affirmed the jury's decision.

politics.title: China will ‘actively’ help to resolve international conflicts, ex-diplomat says
politics.summary: China will actively participate in settling international conflicts and improve mechanisms for resolving them, a former Chinese diplomat has said, stressing that Hong Kong could serve as an “important bridge” for exchanges and a recently established mediation body in the city would bolster the international rule of law. At the Global Prosperity Summit in Hong Kong on Tuesday, Han Zhiqiang, vice-president of the China Public Diplomacy Association, addressed last week’s landmark summit in Beijing...

briefing.news_focus: China will actively participate in settling international conflicts and improve mechanisms for resolving them, a former Chinese diplomat has said, stressing that Hong Kong could serve as an “important bridge” for exchanges and a recently established mediation body in the city would bolster the international rule of law. At the Global Prosperity Summit in Hong Kong on Tuesday, Han Zhiqiang, vice-president of the China Public Diplomacy Association, addressed last week’s landmark summit in Beijing...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國前外交官表示，中國將積極參與解決國際衝突，並改善相關機制。在香港舉行的全球繁榮峰會上，中國公共外交協會副會長韓志強強調，香港可以作為國際交流的重要橋樑，並指出最近在香港成立的調解機構將有助於加強國際法治。
briefing.background: 中國在國際舞台上日益強調其角色，尤其是在解決衝突和促進和平方面。隨著全球地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，中國希望透過外交手段增強其影響力。香港作為中國的一部分，歷來是國際商業和文化交流的中心，這使其成為潛在的調解平台。最近的全球繁榮峰會也顯示出中國對於提升其國際形象和促進多邊合作的重視，尤其是在法治和衝突解決方面。
briefing.analysis: 中國前外交官的發言顯示出中國希望在國際事務中扮演更積極的角色，尤其是在解決衝突的領域。這一策略可能旨在提升中國的國際形象，並強化其在多邊機制中的影響力。香港的調解機構若能有效運作，將可能吸引其他國家參與，進一步鞏固中國在國際法治中的地位。然而，這一舉措也可能受到外界的懷疑，特別是一些國家對中國在國際事務中的透明度和誠信度持保留態度。未來，中國在這一領域的努力能否獲得國際社會的認可，將是觀察的重點。

politics.title: U.S. to host G20 foreign ministers' meet in Atlanta on October 30-31
politics.summary: "Discussions will focus on strengthening international cooperation, addressing global economic challenges, and supporting open markets and resilient supply chains," spokesperson Tommy Pigott said in a statement

briefing.news_focus: "Discussions will focus on strengthening international cooperation, addressing global economic challenges, and supporting open markets and resilient supply chains," spokesperson Tommy Pigott said in a statement
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國將於10月30日至31日在亞特蘭大舉辦G20外長會議。會議將集中討論加強國際合作、應對全球經濟挑戰，以及支持開放市場和韌性供應鏈等議題。發言人湯米·皮戈特在聲明中指出了這些重點。
briefing.background: G20是由20個主要經濟體組成的國際論壇，旨在促進全球經濟合作與發展。隨著全球經濟面臨多重挑戰，包括通貨膨脹、供應鏈中斷及地緣政治緊張，G20外長會議的召開顯得尤為重要。美國作為G20的主要成員之一，承擔著引領全球經濟政策的責任，尤其是在當前形勢下，強調開放市場和穩定供應鏈的必要性。
briefing.analysis: 此次G20外長會議的召開，反映出美國希望在全球經濟治理中發揮更大作用，並促進各國之間的合作。各國外長將面臨如何平衡國內經濟需求與國際責任的挑戰。特別是在供應鏈問題上，許多國家可能會有不同的立場，尤其是面對中國的影響力時。美國可能會推動對中國的貿易政策進行重新評估，這可能會引發其他G20成員國的不同反應，特別是那些與中國有密切經濟往來的國家。會議的結果可能會影響未來的國際貿易政策及經濟合作模式。

politics.title: Nato jet shot down reported stray Ukrainian drone over Estonia, defence minister says – Europe live
politics.summary: Estonia’s defence minister Hanno Pevkur confirmed the news to the Estonian news website Delfi and also the public broadcaster, ERR The latest drone alerts come as Ukraine and Latvia were this morning forced by Russia to repeatedly refute Moscow’s claims that Kyiv was preparing attacks against Russia from Latvia. Ukraine’s foreign ministry spokesperson confirmed that Ukraine does not use the territory of Latvia for its operations against Russia and refuted Moscow’s claims. “ Russia is lying about Latvia allowing any country to use Latvian airspace and territory to launch attacks against Russia or any other country.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Estonia’s defence minister Hanno Pevkur confirmed the news to the Estonian news website Delfi and also the public broadcaster, ERR The latest drone alerts come as Ukraine and Latvia were this morning forced by Russia to repeatedly refute Moscow’s claims that Kyiv was preparing attacks against Russia from Latvia. Ukraine’s foreign ministry spokesperson confirmed that Ukraine does not use the territory of Latvia for its operations against Russia and refuted Moscow’s claims. “ Russia is lying about Latvia allowing any country to use Latvian airspace and territory to launch attacks against Russia or any other country.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 愛沙尼亞國防部長哈諾·佩夫庫爾確認，一架北約戰機擊落了一架失控的烏克蘭無人機，該事件發生在愛沙尼亞領空內。此事件發生之際，烏克蘭和拉脫維亞被迫多次駁斥俄羅斯的聲明，稱基輔正準備從拉脫維亞對俄羅斯發動攻擊。烏克蘭外交部發言人強調，烏克蘭並未利用拉脫維亞的領土進行對俄行動，並指責俄方的說法為虛假。
briefing.background: 近期，烏克蘭與俄羅斯之間的緊張局勢持續升高，特別是在烏克蘭進行反攻的背景下。俄羅斯對烏克蘭及其鄰國的指控頻繁，特別是針對拉脫維亞的指控，這引發了該地區國家的警覺。愛沙尼亞作為北約成員國，對於任何可能的空中威脅都保持高度警惕，並加強了防空措施。此事件凸顯了北約在東歐地區的軍事存在及其對俄羅斯行動的反應。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件顯示了烏克蘭與俄羅斯之間的緊張局勢依然嚴峻，並且在地區安全方面引發了新的擔憂。愛沙尼亞作為北約成員，對於任何潛在的軍事威脅都必須迅速反應，這次擊落無人機的行動可能是對俄羅斯行為的直接回應。烏克蘭方面則強調不會利用拉脫維亞的領土進行攻擊，這一點在參考報導中得到了強調，表明烏克蘭希望維持與鄰國的良好關係。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞集中於事件本身及其對地區安全的影響，而參考報導則提到白俄羅斯進行核武器演習，這可能暗示著更廣泛的地緣政治緊張局勢。

supporting_titles: Belarus holds nuclear weapons drills, Defence Ministry says
supporting_summaries: The Defence Ministry said the training was not directed ‌against any other State and did not pose security threats in the ‌region

economy.title: China joins global sell-off of US Treasuries in March as Iran war prompts panic
economy.summary: Mainland Chinese investors shed their holdings of US Treasury bills in March, joining many overseas institutions and central banks amid uncertainties over the US-Israel war on Iran. Such reductions in Treasury holdings reflected mounting doubts in global markets, analysts said, as the escalating war in Iran fuelled concerns over inflation, energy prices and fiscal pressures, driving Treasury yields higher and overshadowing the likelihood of interest rate cuts from the US Federal Reserve. In...

briefing.news_focus: Mainland Chinese investors shed their holdings of US Treasury bills in March, joining many overseas institutions and central banks amid uncertainties over the US-Israel war on Iran. Such reductions in Treasury holdings reflected mounting doubts in global markets, analysts said, as the escalating war in Iran fuelled concerns over inflation, energy prices and fiscal pressures, driving Treasury yields higher and overshadowing the likelihood of interest rate cuts from the US Federal Reserve. In...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國大陸投資者在三月減持美國國債，這一行為與其他海外機構及中央銀行的動作一致，原因是美國與以色列之間的伊朗戰爭引發市場恐慌。分析師指出，這些減持反映出全球市場對於通脹、能源價格及財政壓力的擔憂，導致國債收益率上升，並壓制了美國聯邦儲備局降息的可能性。
briefing.background: 近期，隨著美國與以色列對伊朗的軍事行動加劇，全球市場的不確定性上升，投資者對於美國國債的信心受到影響。中國作為全球最大的國債持有國之一，其減持行為引發市場關注。美國國債的收益率上升通常會使得持有國債的吸引力下降，特別是在通脹壓力加大的背景下，投資者更傾向於尋找其他投資機會以對抗潛在的財政風險。
briefing.analysis: 中國減持美國國債的行為顯示出其對於美國經濟前景的擔憂，尤其是在伊朗戰爭可能引發的地緣政治風險和經濟不穩定性上。參考報導指出，能源短缺的政府對可再生能源的需求上升，這可能是中國及其他國家考慮重新配置資產的原因之一。不同於主新聞專注於國債的賣出，參考報導強調了可再生能源在當前情勢下的吸引力，顯示出市場對於能源政策的轉變可能會影響未來的投資趨勢。各方可能會在尋求安全資產與追求新興市場機會之間進行權衡，未來的市場動態將取決於地緣政治局勢的發展。

supporting_titles: Renewables are shining. The Iran war amplifies their appeal
supporting_summaries: Two new reports are a must-read of energy-starved governments

economy.title: Energy bills will rise by £209 in July to £1,850 a year, forecast says
economy.summary: Cornwall Insight predicts rise in price cap of nearly 13% in Great Britain as Iran war pushes up gas costs Business live – latest updates Energy bills for households in Great Britain could increase by more than £200 a year to almost £1,900 from this summer in “a kick in the teeth” for millions struggling with the cost of living crisis. A typical gas and electricity bill is forecast to reach £1,850 a year from July under the industry regulator Ofgem’s quarterly price cap, according to analysis by the energy consultancy Cornwall Insight. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Cornwall Insight predicts rise in price cap of nearly 13% in Great Britain as Iran war pushes up gas costs Business live – latest updates Energy bills for households in Great Britain could increase by more than £200 a year to almost £1,900 from this summer in “a kick in the teeth” for millions struggling with the cost of living crisis. A typical gas and electricity bill is forecast to reach £1,850 a year from July under the industry regulator Ofgem’s quarterly price cap, according to analysis by the energy consultancy Cornwall Insight. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據Cornwall Insight的預測，英國的能源價格上限將在七月上調近13%，使家庭的年能源費用增加209英鎊，達到1,850英鎊。這一變化被視為對正在經歷生活成本危機的數百萬家庭的重大打擊，尤其是在伊朗戰爭推高天然氣成本的背景下。
briefing.background: 英國目前正面臨嚴重的生活成本危機，這主要是由於能源價格的飆升和通脹壓力加大。Ofgem作為能源市場的監管機構，定期調整價格上限以反映市場變化。隨著全球能源市場的不穩定性增加，尤其是中東地區的衝突影響，天然氣價格持續上漲，進一步加劇了家庭的經濟負擔。這一預測的發布，正值英國政府面臨壓力，需要採取有效措施來緩解民眾的經濟困境。
briefing.analysis: 此次能源價格上漲將對英國家庭造成直接影響，特別是在目前生活成本危機的背景下，許多家庭已經在努力應對高通脹和生活開支的壓力。這一變化可能會引發社會不滿，並促使政府考慮進一步的補助措施或政策調整，以減輕民眾的負擔。能源公司和政府之間的關係也可能因此受到考驗，能源公司需要在保持盈利和社會責任之間找到平衡。隨著市場的不確定性，未來幾個季度的價格走勢仍需密切關注，尤其是國際局勢的變化如何影響能源供應和價格。

economy.title: China’s Moonshot AI moves to unwind offshore structure in IPO pursuit: sources
economy.summary: Moonshot AI, the Chinese AI unicorn behind the popular Kimi chatbot, has informed shareholders that it intends to dismantle its offshore structure to pave the way for an initial public offering, likely in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter. The Beijing-based start-up, with assets held by a Cayman Islands parent company, has proposed a plan to remove its variable interest entity (VIE) structure. The company sought feedback from investors this week, the two sources said,...

briefing.news_focus: Moonshot AI, the Chinese AI unicorn behind the popular Kimi chatbot, has informed shareholders that it intends to dismantle its offshore structure to pave the way for an initial public offering, likely in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter. The Beijing-based start-up, with assets held by a Cayman Islands parent company, has proposed a plan to remove its variable interest entity (VIE) structure. The company sought feedback from investors this week, the two sources said,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國人工智慧獨角獸Moonshot AI，因其受歡迎的Kimi聊天機器人而聞名，已通知股東計畫拆解其離岸結構，以便為首次公開募股（IPO）鋪路，預計將在香港進行。這家總部位於北京的初創公司目前的資產由開曼群島母公司持有，並提出計畫移除其可變利益實體（VIE）結構。據知情人士透露，該公司本週已向投資者徵求意見。
briefing.background: Moonshot AI的拆解離岸結構計畫反映了中國政府對於企業上市的監管環境變化。過去，中國企業常透過VIE結構來繞過外資限制，然而隨著監管政策的收緊，許多企業開始考慮回歸內地市場，尤其是香港，作為IPO的選擇。香港市場對於科技企業的吸引力逐漸增強，特別是在中國政府積極推動科技創新和數字經濟的背景下，這為Moonshot AI的IPO計畫提供了良好的市場環境。
briefing.analysis: Moonshot AI的決策顯示出其對於未來資本市場的信心，並可能吸引更多國際投資者的關注。拆解VIE結構不僅能夠減少監管風險，還能提升公司透明度，這對於IPO的成功至關重要。參考報導提到的烏茲別克斯坦基金的IPO也顯示出全球投資者對新興市場的興趣，這可能為Moonshot AI的IPO提供一個良好的市場背景。然而，市場對於中國企業的信心仍然受到政策不確定性的影響，投資者將密切關注政府的後續政策動向，以評估這一IPO的潛在風險與機會。
